title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in Cardiovascular System - Agenda - February 26, 2016 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in Cardiovascular System - Agenda - February 26, 2016
- Place: 1600 Scott Street, Holland Cross, Tower B, Room 2048
- Date and time: February 26, 2016, 7:30 am to 16:00 pm
- Participants: SAC-MDUCS Members, Invited Experts, Health Canada
- SAC-MDUCS Members: Eric Cohen, John Ducas (Chair), Christopher Feindel, Marino Labinaz, Alan Menkis, Joaquim Miro, Barry Rubin, Raymond Yee
- Invited Experts: William Geerts, John Parker, Nancy Santesso, Jacqueline Saw
- Health Canada : Director General’s Office, Therapeutic Products Directorate (DGO, TPD) Marion Law Office of Science (OoS, TPD): Eric Ormsby, Hripsime Shahbazian, Caroline Hunt Medical Devices Bureau (MDB, TPD): Carey Agnew, Kevin Day, James McGarrity, Maurice Sylvain, Mark Korchinski, Ian Glasgow, Jianming Hao, Ian Aldous, Lanyi Xu, Catherine Milley, Karen Kennedy, Chris Schmidt Marketed Health Products Directorate (MHPD): Patrick Fandja Health Products and Food Branch Inspectorate (HPFBI): Collin Pinto
- Director General’s Office, Therapeutic Products Directorate (DGO, TPD) Marion Law
- Office of Science (OoS, TPD): Eric Ormsby, Hripsime Shahbazian, Caroline Hunt
- Medical Devices Bureau (MDB, TPD): Carey Agnew, Kevin Day, James McGarrity, Maurice Sylvain, Mark Korchinski, Ian Glasgow, Jianming Hao, Ian Aldous, Lanyi Xu, Catherine Milley, Karen Kennedy, Chris Schmidt
- Marketed Health Products Directorate (MHPD): Patrick Fandja
- Health Products and Food Branch Inspectorate (HPFBI): Collin Pinto
- Regrets: Renzo Cecere, Tofy Mussivand, Brent Mitchell, John Webb
